summary: First testing iteration on the static portfolio site for Fredy Dwi Hartarto. Backend is intentionally unused (frontend-only static portfolio). Executed comprehensive Playwright UI test covering 11 functional areas + visual checks in both light and dark mode. ALL 11 test groups passed. No console errors. No page errors. No horizontal overflow at mobile 500x900. Both themes render polished with proper contrast.

tests_executed.hero_section: PASS - Name 'Fredy Dwi Hartarto', summary, photo (/fredy.jpg, naturalWidth=411 = loaded), all 6 contact pills + 2 CTA buttons visible
tests_executed.theme_toggle: PASS - Toggles dark <-> light, persists in localStorage key 'fredy-theme', survives reload, Sun/Moon icons render correctly
tests_executed.navbar_links: PASS - All 6 desktop nav links (about/skills/experience/projects/education/contact) visible and smooth-scroll works (projects section in viewport after click)
tests_executed.mobile_menu: PASS - At 500x900, mobile-menu-toggle opens panel with all 6 mobile-nav-* links, clicking a link navigates and closes the menu
tests_executed.skills_section: PASS - All 5 skill groups present: Data Analytics, Languages & Libraries, BI & Visualization, Infrastructure, Governance
tests_executed.projects_section: PASS - Both project cards (nexa-churn, revohospital) render with SVG covers, tags, 4 metric cards; 'Read the case study' opens dialog containing Problem/Approach sections; Escape closes the dialog
tests_executed.education_section: PASS - RevoU and Gunadarma both present in DOM
tests_executed.certifications_section: PASS - All 5 certification cards detected in section
tests_executed.contact_form_validation: PASS - Empty submit shows 'Please fill out all fields.' toast
tests_executed.contact_form_submit: PASS - Filled form triggers 'Opening your email client…' success toast (mailto navigation also triggered)
tests_executed.contact_copy_buttons: PASS - Copying email writes 'fredydjogonegoro@gmail.com' to clipboard and shows 'Copied to clipboard' toast
tests_executed.contact_rows: PASS - email/phone/linkedin/github/location all visible with data-testids
tests_executed.footer: PASS - '© 2026 Fredy Dwi Hartarto. Built with React & Tailwind.' + 'Available for new opportunities' both present
tests_executed.light_and_dark_mode_visual: PASS - Both themes render polished with proper contrast (verified in screenshots)
tests_executed.console_errors: PASS - No console errors, no page errors during full test run

critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean and well-organized: sections are split into individual focused components (Hero, Projects, Contact, etc.) — no files >700 lines.
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes as documented in the request — excellent for testability.
No environment-variable issues; this is a frontend-only static site so REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is not used for API calls.

Minor improvement (non-blocking): the stats text is concatenated without a separator (e.g., '14+Years in Infra'). That's purely a screen-reader concern — visually rendered correctly because value and label are in separate <div>s.
No backend present/used — confirmed static portfolio matches the problem statement.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static portfolio site, frontend-only. All data-testids documented in review_request match the implementation. Theme persists via localStorage key 'fredy-theme'. Contact form is mailto-based — to verify submit programmatically in headless Playwright, intercept window.location.href before clicking submit, OR check for the 'Opening your email client…' sonner toast. Sonner toasts can be selected via '[data-sonner-toast], [role="status"]'.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found — all critical flows pass on first iteration.
